notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vereinbarung. This branch models the verb vereinbaren only in the sense of agreeing on or settling a concrete point, date, or condition together.

de.definition: Mit jemandem gemeinsam einen Termin, eine Regel oder eine Bedingung festlegen.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es um das gemeinsame Festlegen oder Absprechen eines konkreten Punkts.
examples: Nach dem Gespräch steht der Termin für nächste Woche fest.

it.definition: Stabilire insieme con qualcuno una data, una regola o una condizione concreta.
it.usage_note: Qui indica l'accordarsi su un punto preciso, non una trattativa lunga o complessa.
examples: Dopo il colloquio, la data per la settimana prossima è ormai fissata.

en.definition: To settle or fix a date, rule, or condition together with someone.
en.usage_note: This covers agreeing on a specific point, date, or condition.
examples: After the meeting, the date for next week is now fixed.

notes: Advanced family expansion around agreement and obligation language. This branch models verbindlich only in the binding, official, or obligatory sense, not the interpersonal sense of polite or obliging behavior.

de.definition: Offiziell geltend oder so festgelegt, dass man sich daran halten muss.
de.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von bindend oder verpflichtend, nicht die Bedeutung höflich oder zuvorkommend.
examples: Ab Montag gilt der Plan für alle Teams offiziell.

it.definition: Ufficialmente valido o stabilito in modo tale da dover essere rispettato.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di obbligatorio o impegnativo sul piano formale.
examples: Da lunedì il piano vale ufficialmente per tutti i team.

en.definition: Officially valid or fixed in a way that has to be respected.
en.usage_note: Only the binding or obligatory sense is modeled here.
examples: From Monday onward, the plan officially applies to every team.

notes: Advanced family expansion around agreement and negotiation language. This branch models Verhandlung only in the sense of negotiation or talks, not the courtroom-trial sense.

de.definition: Ein Gespraech oder eine Reihe von Gespraechen, in denen Bedingungen, Preise oder Entscheidungen ausgehandelt werden.
de.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von Verhandlung als Gespraech oder Negotiation, nicht Gerichtsverhandlung.
examples: Die Gespräche über den Vertrag dauern schon den ganzen Morgen.

it.definition: Una discussione o una serie di discussioni in cui si cercano di definire condizioni, prezzi o decisioni.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di negoziazione, non di udienza o processo.
examples: I colloqui sul contratto vanno avanti già da tutta la mattina.

en.definition: A discussion or series of discussions in which conditions, prices, or decisions are worked out.
en.usage_note: Only the negotiation or talks sense is modeled here, not the courtroom-trial sense.
examples: The talks about the contract have already lasted all morning.

notes: Advanced family expansion around negotiation language. This branch models verhandeln only in the negotiation sense of discussing terms or conditions, not the courtroom sense of trying a case.

de.definition: Mit einer anderen Seite ueber Bedingungen, Interessen oder Entscheidungen sprechen, um zu einer Loesung zu kommen.
de.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinn von Bedingungen oder Interessen besprechen, nicht einen Fall vor Gericht behandeln.
examples: Beide Seiten sprechen mehrere Stunden über die neuen Bedingungen.

it.definition: Discutere con un'altra parte condizioni, interessi o decisioni per arrivare a un'intesa.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di trattare o discutere condizioni per trovare un accordo.
examples: Le due parti parlano per ore delle nuove condizioni.

en.definition: To discuss terms, interests, or decisions with another side in order to reach an agreement.
en.usage_note: This covers discussing terms to reach an agreement.
examples: The two sides talk for hours about the new terms.

notes: Advanced family expansion around negotiation language. This branch models aushandeln as negotiating specific terms until a concrete result is fixed. It stays separate from generic verhandeln.

de.definition: Durch Verhandlungen schrittweise zu einem konkret festgelegten Ergebnis oder Detail kommen.
de.usage_note: Hier ist das Ergebnis staerker im Fokus als beim allgemeineren verhandeln.
examples: Nach mehreren Gesprächen steht der endgültige Preis endlich fest.

it.definition: Definire con trattative i dettagli concreti di un accordo fino a un risultato preciso.
it.usage_note: Qui l'attenzione è sul definire negoziando un esito concreto, non sul discutere in generale.
examples: Dopo diversi incontri, il prezzo finale è ormai fissato.

en.definition: To work out specific terms through negotiation until a concrete result is settled.
en.usage_note: This is more outcome-focused than the broader verb to negotiate.
examples: After several rounds of talks, the final price is now settled.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models leisten only in the sense of accomplishing, carrying out, or producing significant output. The afford sense in sich etwas leisten and other branches stay separate.

de.definition: Mit Einsatz etwas schaffen, erreichen oder als Ergebnis hervorbringen.
de.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinn von etwas erreichen oder zustande bringen, nicht im Sinn von sich etwas leisten = bezahlen koennen.
examples: Trotz wenig Zeit schafft das kleine Team in kurzer Zeit sehr viel.

it.definition: Riuscire a ottenere o portare a termine qualcosa con impegno e lavoro.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di ottenere o compiere qualcosa, non nel senso economico di potersi permettere qualcosa.
examples: Nonostante il poco tempo, il piccolo team ottiene molto in poche ore.

en.definition: To achieve, carry out, or produce something through effort.
en.usage_note: Only the achieve or carry out sense is modeled here, not the afford sense.
examples: Despite the limited time, the small team gets a lot done in just a few hours.

notes: Advanced family expansion around output and formal results language. This branch models erbringen in the formal sense of providing or producing a result, proof, service, or contribution. It stays separate from verbringen = spend time somewhere.

de.definition: Etwas formell oder sachlich als Ergebnis, Nachweis, Leistung oder Beitrag liefern.
de.usage_note: Hauefig in formellen, beruflichen oder sachlichen Kontexten, zum Beispiel fuer Nachweise, Leistungen oder Beitraege.
examples: Der Bericht soll klar zeigen, welche Ergebnisse am Ende vorliegen.

it.definition: Presentare o mettere a disposizione in modo formale un risultato, una prova, un servizio o un contributo.
it.usage_note: Qui in senso formale e orientato al risultato, non come semplice dare quotidiano.
examples: Il rapporto deve mostrare con chiarezza quali risultati sono disponibili alla fine.

en.definition: To formally deliver or make available a result, proof, service, or contribution.
en.usage_note: This covers the formal result-oriented sense, not every everyday use of give or bring.
examples: The report is meant to show clearly which results are available in the end.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models leistungsfähig in the sense of being able to perform strongly, effectively, or reliably under demand.

de.definition: In der Lage, auch unter Belastung stark, effektiv und zuverlaessig zu arbeiten oder Ergebnisse zu erzielen.
de.usage_note: Kann sich auf Menschen, Teams, Systeme oder Geraete beziehen.
examples: Das System bleibt auch bei hoher Belastung schnell und stabil.

it.definition: Capace di lavorare o produrre risultati in modo forte, efficace e affidabile anche sotto carico.
it.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, team, sistemi o dispositivi.
examples: Il sistema resta rapido e stabile anche sotto un carico elevato.

en.definition: Able to work or produce results strongly, effectively, and reliably even under strain.
en.usage_note: This can describe people, teams, systems, or devices.
examples: The system stays fast and stable even under heavy load.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models Leistungsfähigkeit as the capacity to perform well, especially under requirements or strain.

de.definition: Die Faehigkeit, unter Anforderungen oder Belastung gute und zuverlaessige Ergebnisse zu liefern.
de.usage_note: Kann sich auf Menschen, Gruppen, Maschinen oder Systeme beziehen.
examples: Die Untersuchung zeigt, wie gut der Motor unter Belastung arbeitet.

it.definition: La capacità di fornire risultati buoni e affidabili anche in presenza di richieste o carico.
it.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, gruppi, macchine o sistemi.
examples: L'analisi mostra quanto bene il motore lavori sotto carico.

en.definition: The ability to deliver good and reliable results even under requirements or strain.
en.usage_note: This can refer to people, teams, machines, or systems.
examples: The analysis shows how well the engine works under load.

notes: Advanced evaluation branch connected to the performance and achievement family. This branch models überragend as clearly superior, exceptional, or well above an already strong standard.

de.definition: Deutlich besser als andere oder weit ueber einem bereits hohen Standard liegend.
de.usage_note: Stark wertend und hoeher als nur gut oder sehr gut.
examples: Unter vielen starken Beiträgen liegt seine Arbeit klar vorne.

it.definition: Molto al di sopra degli altri o nettamente oltre un livello già alto.
it.usage_note: Valutazione forte, più intensa di semplicemente buono o molto buono.
examples: Tra molti contributi forti, il suo lavoro risulta chiaramente davanti agli altri.

en.definition: Clearly better than others or far above an already high standard.
en.usage_note: A strong evaluative word, stronger than merely good or very good.
examples: Among many strong contributions, his work stands clearly ahead of the rest.
